description: Make historical and live source provenance, licensing and transformations release-reproducible.

gates.evidence: Historical source catalogues and acquisition manifests exist.
All 191 current checksum-bound rows are approved; source-specific restrictions remain authoritative.
Public-data policy excludes raw/local cache paths from tracked outputs.

Reviewed RxNorm CPC, CMS ASP/PFS/HCPCS Level II, HPO and openFDA bundles produce a separately versioned 1,500-case expansion frame with no structural family gap. Fresh blinded review remains issue #491, not a source-acquisition gate.
